name: filex
description: filex is a fast, self-hosted file manager: browse, upload, preview, share and edit files across local folders, S3/MinIO, SFTP, WebDAV and FTP. Public share links with PIN and expiry, file-drop upload links, full-text search, thumbnails, trash and versioning, RBAC, TOTP 2FA, optional SSO (OIDC/LDAP) and an AI/MCP API for agents. Leave the admin fields empty to get a random admin@local password printed once in the app logs (also saved to /data/.first-run.txt).
short_desc: Self-hosted file manager for all your storages
author: BRF-Tech

form_fields.label: Admin email
form_fields.hint: First admin account. Leave empty to use admin@local.

form_fields.label: Admin password
form_fields.hint: Leave empty to get a random password, printed once in the app logs.
